result.summary: Found 4 issues: primarily layout and content clipping problems affecting game cards and navigation elements, with no clear visual affordance for horizontal scrollability.

issues.description: Game cards on the right side of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are clipped mid-content, cutting off game titles (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC... PYRAMIG...'). There is no visible scroll indicator, fade gradient, or affordance to inform users that horizontal scrolling is available.
issues.suggestion: Add a right-side fade/gradient overlay or a visible scroll arrow to indicate the content is horizontally scrollable. Ensure partial card previews are intentional and consistent, and that no critical UI elements (like buttons or key text) are hidden.

issues.description: The top navigation category bar clips the last visible tab label ('Hot Ga...') without any visual indicator of additional tabs, making it unclear to the user that more categories exist.
issues.suggestion: Apply a gradient fade on the right edge of the tab bar or add a chevron/arrow icon to clearly indicate horizontal scrollability. Ensure tab labels are not truncated mid-word.

issues.description: Game card titles within the visible area use inconsistent font sizing and capitalization styles, creating a visually noisy and unpolished grid layout.
issues.suggestion: Standardize game title typography across cards with consistent font size, weight, and casing to create a more cohesive visual hierarchy.

issues.description: The 'EXCLUSIVE' badge overlaps the top-left corner of each game card without adequate padding or contrast on some cards, potentially reducing legibility.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the 'EXCLUSIVE' badge has sufficient background contrast and does not visually conflict with the game artwork beneath it. Consider adding a subtle shadow or semi-transparent background.
